zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Luttrell於1364年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir Andrew Lutteral29歲，母親Elizabeth Courtenay31歲。他和Katherine Beaumont至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1428年3月24日在英國英格蘭多瑟特沙福斯波利享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Luttrell于1364年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir Andrew Lutteral29岁，母亲Elizabeth Courtenay31岁。他和Katherine Beaumont至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1428年3月24日在英国英格兰多瑟特沙福斯波利享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Luttrell was born in 1364, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Andrew Lutteral, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Courtenay, was 31. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Katherine Beaumont. He died on 24 March 1428, in Shaftesbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Luttrell est né en 1364, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Andrew Lutteral, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Courtenay, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Katherine Beaumont. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1428, à Shaftesbury, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Luttrell 1364 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Andrew Lutteral 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Courtenay 31. Er hatte mit Katherine Beaumont mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. März 1428 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Shaftesbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Luttrell è nato il nel 1364 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Andrew Lutteral, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Courtenay, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Katherine Beaumont. Morì il 24 marzo 1428, nel Shaftesbury, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Luttrellが1364年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Andrew Lutteralは29歳，母Elizabeth Courtenayは31歳であった。彼はKatherine Beaumontとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1428年3月24日にイギリスイギリスドールセトシャフテスブリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Luttrell(이)가 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Andrew Lutteral(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Courtenay(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Katherine Beaumont(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 3월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 샤프츠버이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Luttrell nasceu em 1364, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Andrew Lutteral, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Courtenay, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Katherine Beaumont. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1428, em Shaftesbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Luttrell родился в 1364 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Andrew Lutteral было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Courtenay, 31. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Katherine Beaumont. Он умер 24 марта 1428 г. в местности шафтесбури, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Luttrell nació en 1364, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Andrew Lutteral, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Courtenay, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Katherine Beaumont. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1428, en Shaftesbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
